name: codex-video-production
description: Codex-driven video production with a local interactive review surface.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and review TVC production in a local Preview.
interface.longDescription: Keeps Codex in control while a local browser surface handles structured clarification, sourced planning, proposal comparison, per-Unit media review, and final TVC approval.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $video-production. Run the selected TVC stage through Preview and follow every durable media and approval contract.
